'''Rethorn''' was a prominent [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] region. He was responsible for inciting several revolutions against both [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] interests after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. His criminal activities primarily included weapons dealing.
